title: Command Cockpit Stage Footer Rail
summary: Turned the empty floor below the compact Overview mission panel into a mounted-stage footer rail with level, quest progress, gate pressure, and next-move cells.
proof: Added activeLaneStageFooterRail markup fed by lane level, quest checkpoint progress, blockers, pending requests, and next action.
Scoped the rail to the Command Cockpit Overview mounted stage with a flex floor anchor and animated sweep line.
Verified the live 390x760 cockpit: rail bottom 671px, bottom dock y 692px, 21px clearance, no horizontal overflow.
